verdict: The current PR #230 surface has no retained top-Yukawa closure.  All tested non-MC shortcuts are blocked or conditional.  The shortest honest retained routes are: strict direct physical measurement, a new scalar pole-residue/common-dressing theorem, or a newly derived Planck stationarity selector.  The first two preserve the current claim posture; the third requires a new theorem and cannot be merely assumed.
